name: Foreign Equity & T1135 Tech Worker Return
description: Complete Jason Chen's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\. Save the completed return as 'jason_chen.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.
